title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Torrent Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Torrent Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!
